title: ProgressSignal
description: Normalized, source-linked observation used to reconcile classroom evidence, service delivery, and IEP goal progress.

signal_id.description: UUID identifying this normalized progress observation across reconciliation and audit workflows.

student_ref.description: District identifier for the student to whom this progress observation belongs.

signal_type.description: Controlled category identifying whether the observation came from achievement data, delivered service minutes, or teacher narrative.

observed_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z representing when the underlying performance or service was observed.

ingested_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z representing when Bridgeline normalized the source record.

recorded_by.description: Human or system actor responsible for recording the underlying observation.

measurement.description: Normalized numeric or textual observation, with application validation requiring exactly one populated value.

source.description: Traceable evidence locator for the original row, entry, or check-in from which the signal was normalized.

goal_mapping.description: Reviewable mapping between this signal and an IEP goal, including confidence and rationale when mapped.

actor_ref.description: District identifier of the responsible human, or the literal system identifier for automated imports.

actor_role.description: Role under which the actor recorded or supplied the progress observation.

metric.description: Stable metric label such as assignment_percentage, rubric_score, minutes_delivered, or teacher_narrative.

numeric_value.description: Normalized quantitative value when the source is numeric, otherwise null.

text_value.description: Normalized narrative value when the source is textual, otherwise null.

unit.description: Unit for a numeric measurement, such as percent, points, or minutes, otherwise null when not applicable.

source_name.description: Human-readable file, form, or source-system name from which the progress observation originated.

source_record_ref.description: Stable row, entry, or record identifier that permits retrieval of the original evidence.

source_excerpt.description: Raw source excerpt supporting the normalized measurement and displayed during reconciliation review.

goal_id.description: Stable UUID of the mapped IEP goal, or null while the signal is unmapped.

status.description: Workflow state describing whether goal linkage is absent, automated, human-confirmed, or ambiguous.

confidence.description: Mapping confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 when a goal link has been proposed, otherwise null.

rationale.description: Evidence-based explanation for the proposed or confirmed goal mapping, otherwise null when unmapped.
